name: Gerald Cannon
abstract: Gerald Leon Cannon (born 1958) is an American jazz double bassist and visual artist.

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: In the rhythm is the rhythm section you saw last night: Danny Mixon, Dave Gibson, and Gerald Cannon... That’s it. We have a couple of vocalists... That’s just another one of those things. This society -­ we fail to recognize some of our greater talents. That’s it. That’s the Loud Minority family.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
